seoTitle: Wilkesdale vs Willow Vale — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Wilkesdale and Willow Vale. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Wilkesdale vs Willow Vale: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Wilkesdale and Willow Vale.
heading: Wilkesdale vs Willow Vale — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Wilkesdale, Queensland and Willow Vale, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Wilkesdale has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Willow Vale (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Wilkesdale or Willow Vale safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Wilkesdale has a flood risk score of 24/100, while Willow Vale scores 47/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Wilkesdale scores 48/100 for bushfire risk. Willow Vale scores 41/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Wilkesdale or Willow Vale?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Wilkesdale has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.52% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
